positive: A highly stylized, clean vector illustration of a whimsical forest creature, perhaps a stylized fox or deer hybrid, sitting peacefully in a bioluminescent forest glade. The composition should be central and symmetrical, focusing on a strong, identifiable silhouette. Incorporate geometric patterns and simplified natural elements like oversized leaves, glowing mushrooms, and delicate vines. The style must be a modern, clean graphic aesthetic, optimized for screen printing or apparel textiles. Use a limited, complementary color palette of deep forest greens, earthy terracotta, and pops of luminous teal and gold. Dramatic edge lighting, solid background fill (optional gradient), high contrast, and excellent linework, suitable for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low resolution, poor anatomy, deformed, text, watermark, signature, logo, extra limbs, grainy, realistic photo, messy, complex background
